message:
Optimize query patterns and reduce allocations

- Consolidate indexable_document_count() to single query (4 queries → 1)
- Optimize median calculation: reuse count from first query instead of
  subquery scan in OFFSET clause
- Optimize type_counts(): count with &'static str keys first, convert
  to String only for final 4-entry result (O(n) allocations → O(1))

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
